name: Precipio, Inc.
summary: Precipio, Inc. is a healthcare biotechnology company focused on improving cancer diagnostics, particularly hematologic malignancies. The company operates two divisions: a Pathology Services Division providing specialized cancer diagnostic testing (molecular diagnostics, cytogenetics) to physicians, hospitals, and laboratories; and a Products Division that develops and commercializes proprietary diagnostic assays and kits for use by other clinical laboratories. Its integrated R&D model uses clinical lab operations to develop and validate diagnostic products at incremental cost.

products.name: Pathology Diagnostic Testing Services
products.description: Specialized cancer diagnostic testing including molecular diagnostics and cytogenetics for hematologic malignancies, serving physicians, hospitals, and laboratories.

products.name: Proprietary Diagnostic Assays and Kits
products.description: Developed and commercialized diagnostic assays and kits intended for use by other clinical laboratories to improve testing accessibility and workflow efficiency.
